name: Predaprimitive
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>捕食原生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>プレデター・プリミティブ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send 1 "Predap" card from your Deck to the GY, except "Predaprimitive"; add 1 "Polymerization" Spell or "Fusion" Spell from your Deck to your hand, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, except Plant and Dragon monsters. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned to your opponent's field (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Fusion Monster you control; destroy it. You can only activate 1 "Predaprimitive" per turn.
eff: Send 1 "Predap" card from your Deck to the GY, except "Predaprimitive"; add 1 "Polymerization" Spell or "Fusion" Spell from your Deck to your hand, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, except Plant and Dragon monsters. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned to your opponent's field (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Fusion Monster you control; destroy it. You can only activate 1 "Predaprimitive" per turn.

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
